## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-driven initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/H-xHBfs-u9XKBrRsvm8qesfsNsKiyjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance trending upward, with email header articles performing well](https://fathom.video/share/H-xHBfs-u9XKBrRsvm8qesfsNsKiyjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [Publishing backlog to be prioritized next week, aiming to publish \~60 remaining articles](https://fathom.video/share/H-xHBfs-u9XKBrRsvm8qesfsNsKiyjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [AI-driven content strategy being implemented, focusing on LLM citations and prompt optimization](https://fathom.video/share/H-xHBfs-u9XKBrRsvm8qesfsNsKiyjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [New workflow and dashboard to be rolled out next week for improved efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/H-xHBfs-u9XKBrRsvm8qesfsNsKiyjBv?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

### Content Publishing Strategy
